resources.title: Elixir HTTP clients in 2024
resources.description: Comparison including Mint, with advice on when to adopt it directly.

resources.title: Mint HTTP library for Elixir (news & overview)
resources.description: High-level overview of Mint and how it differs from wrapper clients.

resources.title: Mint: a new HTTP client for Elixir
resources.description: An introduction to Mint, a low-level, processless HTTP/1 and HTTP/2 client for Elixir focused on correctness and explicit control over connections.
